title: Bangkok bar fire in Chatuchak district
summary: A fire broke out at the Rong Beer Na Lat Phrao bar and restaurant in Bangkok on July 12, 2026, killing dozens and injuring many, with investigations focusing on electrical and structural safety factors.

events.chapter_summary: A fire at Rong Beer Na Lat Phrao bar in Bangkok's Chatuchak district on July 12, 2026 killed at least 28–30 people and injured more than 70, with preliminary investigations suggesting an electrical short circuit near the stage as the likely cause, compounded by obstructed emergency exits, flammable materials, and a power outage.

The death toll has risen to 30 with 75 injured, and investigators have identified a suspected electrical short circuit in a ceiling air conditioner as the likely cause, while also examining obstructed exits and flammable materials as contributing factors.
